name: mca-lending-platform
description: Production-ready Merchant Cash Advance lending platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm start" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.test: cd client && npm test && cd ../server && npm test
